title: Customer Names and Emails
description: Retrieve only the name and email of all customers, excluding the _id field.
concept: Projections control which fields are returned. Use {field: 1} to include or {field: 0} to exclude. When including fields, _id is returned by default unless explicitly excluded with {_id: 0}.
hint: Add a projection as the second argument: db.customers.find({}, {name: 1, email: 1, _id: 0})
